articles.title: Investors Dumped a Record Amount of Bitcoin Last Week, Only to Miss Out on a Face Ripping Rally
articles.description: Digital asset investment products saw their highest-ever weekly outflow last week, according to the latest Digital Asset Fund Flows Weekly Report released by CoinShares. The $255 million in net outflows amounted to 1.0% of total assets under management (AuM) fleeing from the space.... Read More: Investors Dumped a Record Amount of Bitcoin Last Week, Only to Miss Out on a Face Ripping...
